items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 公告：美国政府已对其下达出口管制指令，要求暂停所有对 Claude Fable 5 与 Claude Mythos 5 的访问。这是区域性可用性的强制变更，属于重大事件。差异点在于此前已上架的 Fable 5/Mythos 5 现被全量下线，包括此前可用区域。已有调用 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 的服务必须立即切换模型，否则请求将直接失败。
items.backend_focus: 紧急行动：把所有 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 的调用替换为可用的 Claude Opus 4.8 或 Sonnet 系列；检查代码中的 model 字段默认值；关注 Anthropic 后续是否会开放替代型号或区域白名单。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.8，Opus 系列再升级，在 coding、agentic 任务与专业工作负载上表现更强。差异点相对 Opus 4.5/4.7 是更强的 agent 与代码能力，同时按惯例伴随价格/context window 的微调（具体参数以官方 model card 为准）。旧 Opus 型号预计进入 deprecation 倒计时，需关注 sunset 时间表。
items.backend_focus: 升级方式：把 model 字段从 claude-opus-4-5 等旧版本改为 claude-opus-4-8，重新跑回归与成本评估；检查 max_tokens / context window 是否同步调整；用 Anthropic SDK 最新版本（@anthropic-ai/sdk）以获得新模型 ID。

items.title: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas" The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on A
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Corps We’re launching Claude Corps, a national fellowship program for people early in their careers who are passionate about extending the benefits of AI to communities across America. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to approx...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 联合创始人 Chris Olah 对教皇 Leo XIV 通谕 Magnifica humanitas 发表致辞。这是政策/伦理层面的公开声明，与产品/接口无关。差异点仅在公共讨论层面，对调用方 API 完全无影响。已有 Claude 集成无需改动。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是公共政策评论，与工程无关。

items.title: Results from the first Anthropic Public Record
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 发布首期 Anthropic Public Record 结果，披露其在政策倡导与组织透明度方面的进展。这是治理透明度报告，非产品/接口更新。差异点仅在公开信息披露层面，对开发者 API 无任何变化。已有 Claude 集成无需改动。
items.backend_focus: 无。这是 governance/transparency 报告，与工程无关。
